listings.title: Treasure Me is Hosting an Online Auction in Cherry Hill Township, Pickup Sunday, July 19
listings.company: Treasure Me Estate Sales 1-800-NOT-JUNK Free Consults
listings.description: Thank you for visiting our latest online sale hosted from a home in Cherry Hill! In this auction you'll find a mix of items including a huge collection of vintage comic books, collectible political buttons, antique bottles, and so much more.. Bidding starts to close at 7 pm on Friday, July 17. Pickups will take place on Sunday, July 19, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. Shipping is also available on select items. Have fun shopping and good luck bidding!

listings.title: Sunday Night July 19th 6pm Est. Collectible Online Auction Sale.
listings.description: Sunday Night July 19th 6pm Est. Collectible Online Auction Sale. All Small Items Shipped Only.

listings.title: GoldenTree ~ Benefit Auction - Bridge Street Chamber Players of New Hope, PA
listings.description: A charity auction for Bridge Street Chamber Players of New Hope, PA. All proceeds will go toward programs of classical music in the New Hope area @ Trinity Episcopal Church, their series is dedicated to the live performance of chamber music for mixed instruments, with a special emphasis on works that include the mandolin. Audiences will experience a range of performances from well known chamber staples to lesser known works, new arrangements and new music. The Bridge Street Chamber Players are a 501(c)(3)

listings.title: Treasure Me is Hosting an Online Auction in Sicklerville: SUNDAY July 26 Pickup, 10am-2pm
listings.company: Treasure Me Estate Sales 1-800-NOT-JUNK Free Consults
listings.description: Welcome to a quick sale out of a beautifully decorated home in Sicklerville. This lovely residence was filled with treasures. In this auction you'll find vintage porcelain lamps including Capodimonte and more. We've also got lots of home decor for all seasons, including spooky Halloween witches and lovely springtime trinkets. This pickup will take place SUNDAY July 26 from 10am-2pm. No one will be allowed inside the home, all items will be brought to winning bidders at the front door/parking lot. No shipping available for this auction. Happy bidding!

listings.title: 25% OFF Amazing Blackwood Estate!!
listings.description: 25% OFF FRIDAY (TILL 3PM) PARKING INFO BELOW. China Jewelry Glassware Ephemera (vintage greeting cards) Griswold cast-iron pan vintage Linens Beautiful queen bedroom set solid wood Orek vacuum antique figurines antique server with marble top Concrete garden decor and benches Concrete birdbath Recliners kitchen wears Basement is filled Gardening and yard equipment Shed filled MUCH MORE!! Plenty of parking but street on a dead end and is narrow, so 1.) please pull in turn around and face your car facing outward so you can just pull out and drive away when you are done shopping. There will be too many cars to do this after shopping. If you see others parking facing the dead end, please kindly ask them to refer to our parking directions and face outward to avoid accidents later. 2.) Park on Princess (Cross Street).

listings.title: Newtown Square Summer Sale - Bidding ends 7/22
listings.description: Welcome Home to CTBids! We put together an excellent selection of items for you! Start exploring and discover the deals for yourself! Bidding on ALL items starts at $1! Our Newtown Square Summer Sale is filled with beautiful things from around the world. Italian, Portuguese and Asian Furniture, Decor, Collectibles and Art. Vintage Character and Advertising Glasses. Vintage Toys. Watches. Silverplate, Brass, Copper. Outstanding Mid Century Modern Daybed Sofas, Table, Chairs, Entertainment Center. Craftsman Style Bookcases. Banquet Sized Cookware. Small Kitchen Appliances. Tools and Tool Storage Chests. Snowblower, Leaf Blower, Chainsaw, John Deere E110 Lawn Tractor. Large Cash and Carry Sale for Winning Bidders! EVERYTHING MUST GO! Browse and bid on unique and everyday treasures at Brandywine.CTBids.com About Caring Transitions and CTBids: We are carefully managing the treasures and everyday household items for our clients as they downsize or transition to new homes. These items have quality, value, and a history that are a perfect fit for someone else. Our mission was to create a platform where these estate sales are brought to you online. Instead of set pricing, bidding starts at $1. This process allows our bidders to find unique and everyday treasures for a great value. In addition, the repurposing of these belongings will have a positive and lasting impact on the world we all share. CTBids gives us the ability to connect family heirlooms made with yesterday’s craftsmanship with new owners who will give them new LIFE . From unique treasures to everyday items, you will always find something interesting on CTBids! Everyone wins, including the environment! Transitions, by nature, can have profound effects on the environment, and we’re committed to mitigating these impacts. We care about the environment, and the necessity to repurpose household treasures. Caring Transitions is the nation’s largest and most trusted organization specializing in downsizing, relocation, estate sales, decluttering, home cleanouts, online auctions and other services. There are over 325 locations nationwide that are total solution providers for all of life’s transitions. Embrace new beginnings with confidence by learning more on our website ! ALL bidders need to register on CTBids, but registration is easy. We look forward to seeing you there! Bidding Just Got Easier! Download our new app in your app store today. Want to be the first to hear about our new sales? Follow us on Facebook ! Overwhelmed by your belongings? Learn more about our services visit our website !

listings.description: This Estate Sale has tools and trains and clothing and plants and sports memorabilia and lots of things to pick through. Some Americana and ephemera. Please take time to look at the pictures to see the items that are included. We don't give out pricing beforehand or do pre-sales. The sign-up sheet to enter will be out from 7 AM on Friday.

listings.title: Just Listed! Exceptional Haddonfield Estate Sale | Fine Furniture & Treasures - One Weekend Only!
listings.description: Welcome to another exceptional sale presented by Keys & Keepsakes Estate Sales! Step inside this beautifully maintained Haddonfield home, where every room offers quality furnishings, timeless décor, and carefully collected treasures. Whether you're searching for fine furniture, unique collectibles, or special pieces to complete your home, you'll find something worth discovering. Highlights Include: 🪑 Quality Furniture Formal dining room suite China cabinet & buffet Secretary desk Beautiful upholstered sofas & chairs Leather accent chair Cedar chest Bedroom furniture Vanity with mirror Wicker sunroom furniture Accent tables & bookcases Lamps & framed artwork 🎶 Collectors Will Love Vintage Sansui stereo equipment Speakers & audio components Collectible farm toys Art pottery Decorative accessories 🏠 Throughout the Home Crystal China Glassware Kitchenware Home décor Holiday décor Books Linens Small furniture And many more surprises throughout the house! Why You Should Come This is not an overcrowded home packed floor to ceiling—it's a thoughtfully furnished home filled with quality pieces that have been lovingly cared for over the years. If you appreciate classic style, solid craftsmanship, and unique finds, you'll want to put this sale on your weekend schedule. We look forward to welcoming you! — The Keys & Keepsakes Estate Sales Team

listings.description: Join Ben Hersh Estate Sales in Laurel Springs for a clean, well-presented two-day sale featuring a strong mix of furniture, decorative pieces, collectibles, and everyday household finds. Highlights include accent seating, a dining table with painted chairs, a digital piano, colorful art glass stemware, vintage Matchbox boxes, die-cast cars, comics, superhero collectibles, and more. All furniture is available for pre-sale. Furniture Dark wood dining table Mixed painted dining chairs, including red spindle-back chairs Floral upholstered accent chair Pair of cream boucle-style accent chairs Blue accent table Digital piano with bench Art, Decor & Household Colorful art glass stemware Table lamp Framed wall art Wall mirror Wall clock Rugs and decorative accessories Collectibles Vintage Pine Valley Gold Club Member golf bag with headcovers & collared shirts Vintage Matchbox Lesney boxes Hot Wheels Showcase with die-cast cars Marvel and DC comic books Packaged superhero action figures Super Powers collectible case / binder Toy playset / collectible toy display piece Clothing / Sports Philadelphia Eagles jacket Additional Notes All furniture is available for pre-sale Ben Hersh Estate Sales - 888-406-3513 - 856-282-5844 - info@benhershestatesales.com - facebook.com/benhershestatesales - instagram.com/benhershestatesales.

listings.title: The Three R Gals are in Woolwhich Twp for a True Estate Sale in a Beautiful Home
listings.description: **We had to change the date of the sale due to the street being resurfaced the first day of the sale! We don’t want our customers to have to walk 1/2 mile to the sale! So we are pushing back one week” The Three R Gals will be at a beautiful home in a gated community with lovely furnishings, accessories and home decor along with Gold and Sterling Jewelry and a Coin Collection. We still have more to go through but here are just a few of the items we will have at the sale for your perusal! Gold, Sterling and Costume Jewelry including a beautiful 14K and diamond tennis bracelet! Bowling Balls, Shoes, Other Bowling Equipment Cooks Meat Carving Machine Workbench with several handtools, lawntools, etc Large Toolchest with various wrenches, Hardware, etc Large Fiberglass Ladder 2 Sets of Pyrex Mixing Bowls, Primary 2 Sets of Pyrex Refrigerator Dishes Delta Miter Saw/Chop Saw with Table Power Tools by Black and Decker, Skill and more WEN Power Car Waxer with Accessories Frigidaire Refrigerator and Freezer in very good condition Collection of CD's, 8 Track Tapes and Cassette Tapes Beautiful 8 Ft. Brunswick Camden II Pool Table with Solid Wood Cabinet, Ball in claw legs and tassel drop pockets Accessories for Pool Table including a Collection of Cuetec Pool Cues all in great condition! Traditional Bedroom Furniture including Dresser, Hi Boy, Nightstands all in very good condition Curio Wall Cabinets Wood Sailboats Ethan Allen Leather Top Desk and Matching Leather Chair Statue - Austin Productions "Couple Embracing" C.1981 Library Style Table Vintage Wood Secretary Drop Down Desk Piano Stool with Glass Ball and Claw Feet Several pieces of metal and brass all art Replogle 16" Diameter Globe on Wooden Stand Solid Wood Bedroom Furniture with Dresser, Mirror, Bed and Nightstand in Excellent Condition Several Wooden Consoles, some from Ethan Allen Two Large Leather Recliners Kitchen Table and Chairs Dining room Table and Chairs with Leaf Ethan Allen Floral Sofa Industrial Style Coffee Table Featuring a Solid Wood Plank Top with Black corner brackets and large Cast Iron Wheels Several Chairs, Side Tables, Console Tables and More - Great options for Clean, Furniture in Excellent Condition! So much more at this house! Don't Miss It!

listings.title: Moving Sale- Furniture, Collectibles, Home Goods
listings.description: Come shop this Moving Sale on July 17th, 18th, and 19th! Lots of sturdy wooden furniture- King Size Bed frame and Mattress, Queen Size Murphy bed/wall bed (with assembly instructions on DVD, from Wilding Wall Beds) with Mattress, Dining room table/chairs set, Dressers (Broyhill), Tall Lit Curio Cabinet, Coffee/Side/TV tables, Gorgeous Grandmother Clock, Bookshelves. Living room set- Couches, Chair, and Ottomans. Side table Lamps. Large Tapestries and Rugs. Dining room glass top Table and Chairs set, Kitchen Buffet with fold-out. Large desk. Decor items! Mirrors, tables, shelves. Kitchen utensils/appliances and hosting items as well! Collectables include a full Lenox 'Charleston' china set, Creative Manor china set, and Lenox animal figurines. China comes with storage cases. Patio furniture set- 3 standing Umbrellas, Table, Chairs, Loveseat, side tables. Plant stands. Shed items- Bikes, Mower, Lawn/yard/garden tools, Rakes, Weed-whacker, Beach Chairs, etc.

listings.title: 60+ years of collecting antiques, art, rare books & hidden treasures
listings.description: A true collector's estate - something for everyone! After more than 60 years of collecting, this home is filled with an incredible variety of antiques, artwork, books, collectibles and unique treasures. This is not your typical estate sale - every room offers something interesting to discover! Highlights include original and antique artwork, stained glass windows, rare books (some first editions, academic, historical and Delaware related), antique furniture, African and Japanese wood masks, pottery, oriental rugs (also Turkish and Iranian), tools, garden accessories, vintage photo developing equipment (including enlarger, trays and beakers) and one-of-a-kind pieces gathered over a lifetime.

listings.title: Yardley Estate Sale /Quality Furnishings/MCM/ Kawai Piano
listings.description: Contents of a lovely four bedroom home filled with quality furnishings to include: K Kawai Grand Piano (KG-2C) 766346 French Country Pine Hutch /Table w/6 Chairs Dining Room Set MCM George Nelson for Herman Miller Shelf Unit Mid Cent Desk Antique Edison Victrola w/ Horn Waterford/ Galway Crystal Lenox Solitaire China Fur Coats Rugs Beds Sofas Artwork Outdoor Furniture Decorative Accessories Much More…. Watch for updates as we get closer to the sale.

listings.description: This sale has furniture from Restoration Hardware, Pottery Barn, Crate & Barrel, Anthropology, West Elm, Herman Miller, Bassett, Braxton Culler, Kingsley Bate, Plank and Hide, Ethan Allen, Ralph Lauren, and more! Not to mention the Art by Tony La Salle! Other items include television, glasses, utensils, kitchen items, mirrors, linens, tools, holiday decor, electronics, stereo equipment and more!

listings.title: Travel to Treasures 🌎 Warminster Estate Sale!
listings.description: 🌏 Around the World Without Leaving Warminster! ✈️🛍️ Ready for your next treasure hunt? This condo is packed from top to bottom with incredible finds, unique décor, and pieces that tell a story. Every corner offers a new surprise, and trust us…you’ll want to take your time exploring this one! Here’s just a peek at what you’ll discover: ● 🏮 Beautiful Asian art and decorative pieces ● 🪑 One-of-a-kind furniture ● 🍽️ Elegant Minton china ● 👜 Designer handbags ● 💍 Jewelry for every taste ● 🖼️ Beautiful artwork ● ✨ Unique collectibles and home décor ⚫️ 👗Lots of designer dresses and Clothes ● 🎁 And plenty more treasures waiting to be found! Whether you’re a collector, reseller, decorator, or simply love the thrill of discovering something special, this sale is one you won’t want to miss. At The Wynn Team, we believe every estate has a story—and this condo is filled with beautiful pieces just waiting to begin their next chapter. 🚪 Come early, bring a friend, and get ready to fill your bags (and maybe your trunk)! We can’t wait to see you in Warminster! Fair warning: You may stop by for “just a quick look”…but don’t be surprised if you leave with your new favorite treasure! 😉 ‼️ Please note we weren’t permitted to put up signs around the condo for directions. It’s building #6 and we will have someone directing you in. Don’t hesitate to give me a call if you have any issues. Winnie 267-229-4860

listings.title: Hydrangeas’ Estate Sales In New Hope
listings.description: This sale is FULL of years of world travel collections, overseas living and many other treasures. Way too many treasures to even list with a lot more here than in the photos. Highly suggest following us on Insta or Facebook @ Hydrangeas’ Estate Sales to see some of the videos we posted. That will provide an even better idea. List for entry will go out at 9 am one hour prior to open for the first day only. We will try to fit it as many as we can. Look forward to seeing you soon.

listings.description: .This will be an amazing Sale. This Home was Built Circa 1740. This Historic Landmark is loaded with Items From then till now. Starting with a very well cared for 2005 Chrysler PT Cruiser. Starts right up no Issues , There are loads of Antique items, A Primitive Carpenters Joiner Bench, Pottery, Antique Porcelain, Homer Laughlin Harlequin Dinnerware, Oil Lamps Art, Crystal, Books dating from The 1700's, Victorian Furniture, Antique Sarouk Persian Rug measuring 9'6 by 12'6 This rug has had a couple repairs and will need more and a cleaning, And Other area rugs, Men's and Woman's Vintage Clothing, Several Vintage Coach Handbags Hats, As well as a rather large Cb Ham Radio Collection Walkie Talkie's, Hundreds of Mcdonalds and Burger King Happy meals never opened. Record Albums, Working Pioneer SX-680 Reciever Loads of Guitar Parts and cases,Tuners Knobs Strings. We have an American Girl limited edition Doll with many accessories. We are still in the process of Staging the home Now and will be adding pictures and Discriptions as the sale Date nears.

listings.title: Treasure Hunter's Dream—It's Wild in Westville!
listings.description: For planning purposes, this sale is near Shady Lane School in Westville, New Jersey. So much more for us to go through - this listing will be updated right up until the sale. Additional pictures will be added continuously so keep checking back! After 30+ years of passionate hunting, a truly diverse collection is ready for new owners. This is not your average house sale—it is a time capsule packed with authentic sports memorabilia, autographed photos, ephemera, art, stamps, currency/coins, collectibles, electronics, antiques, everyday treasures and vintage items. Don’t miss this one! Hand tools, Vintage clothing, Rosenthal, antique furniture, old currency, Haviland pottery, Limoges, Noritake, Villeroy & Bosch, chrome racks. Autographed pictures of sports, celebrity, and political figures: Donald Trump, Muhammad Ali, Arnold Schwarzenegger, etc. Stuffed animals, Beanie Babies, fishing knives, folding knives, Navy memorabilia, antique clocks, stamps, letter collections. Coins, electronics, maps, handmade model tall ships, DVDs and VHS. Postcard collections, toys, trading card collections including boxing, basketball, other sports, Star Trek & military. TONS of books, patches, magazines, comic books, shrunken heads, political signs, Olympic memorabilia, vintage photos. Knickknacks, tons of figurines and collectibles, beer steins, HOLIDAY, Authentic American flags used at Capitol building (certified). Rock ‘n’ roll items, CDs, vinyl, autographs & memorabilia. Tons of framed pictures, posters, unique finds, vintage photos, scrimshaw, sculptures, paintings, risqué vintage photos. Antique cast iron waffle makers & cookie presses, brass, cameras, Delft, Jasperware, nesting dolls, vintage t-shirts. Haag, commercial shredder, vintage cookie jars, Gemmy clown costumes, dolls, Fenton, treadle sewing base, Polish folk art plates, Waterford, trains, pewter, Murano, blue & pink glass. Windham Heights Cobblestone Collectibles, lighters, Lane blanket chests, flatware, vintage ashtrays, fabric. Tins, Tony Stewart, Ed Hardy motorcycle helmet, Nippon china, Trenton china, walnut bookshelf, Mikasa, brass jewelry scale, Union National antique dresser, alabaster, S&P, Irish linens. Premium cookware, crystal, copper, tons of small appliances, glassware, and everyday home essentials.
